text: Python Programming (Python for Everybody) — University of Michigan.
title: Python for Everybody
description: Specialization covering Python programming fundamentals, data structures, web scraping, and databases.
highlights: Built a strong foundation in Python syntax, data structures, and problem solving.
Covered working with APIs, databases, and data retrieval in Python.

text: AWS Masterclass: DevOps with AWS Command Line Interface (CLI) — Eduonix Learning Solutions.
title: AWS Masterclass: DevOps w/ AWS CLI
description: Hands-on course on DevOps practices and cloud infrastructure management using the AWS Command Line Interface.
highlights: Practiced managing AWS resources via the CLI for deployment workflows.
Learned DevOps fundamentals applied to cloud infrastructure management.

title: Django Certification
description: Certification covering Django web framework fundamentals for building backend applications.
highlights: Built backend applications using Django's ORM, views, and templating.
Practiced structuring scalable Django projects and REST integrations.

title: Data Science
description: Currently building data science skills covering data analysis, statistics, and visualization to complement backend engineering work.
highlights: Strengthening data analysis and statistics fundamentals.
Learning tools like Pandas, NumPy, and visualization libraries.

title: Gen AI
description: Currently deepening expertise in Generative AI to build on existing experience integrating OpenAI and AWS Sagemaker into backend systems.
highlights: Learning LLM application patterns, prompt engineering, and RAG pipelines.
Applying Generative AI to backend and API-driven products.

title: Machine Learning
description: Currently building core machine learning skills to better integrate ML models into backend systems.
highlights: Learning core ML algorithms and model evaluation techniques.
Applying ML concepts to real backend integrations, building on existing Sagemaker experience.
